business.name: Handyman Tampa Bay
business.tagline: The fix you need, done right the first time

hero.headline: When it breaks, *we fix it*. No project too small.
hero.subheadline: From drywall repairs to bathroom vanities — we handle the punch list so you don't have to.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: Every repair. Every project. Done right.
services_section.subheading: From the smallest fix to complete room updates

services.title: Drywall & Paint Repairs
services.description: Holes, cracks, and damage disappear completely. You won't find a trace of our work when we're done.

services.title: Bathroom Updates
services.description: Vanity replacements, fixture installations, and everything between the tiles.

services.title: Closet & Storage Fixes
services.description: Bi-fold doors that actually work, shelving that stays put, and storage solutions that last.

services.title: Exterior Repairs
services.description: Soffit, fascia, and outdoor fixtures. Weather damage and critter chaos — we handle it all.

services.title: Punch List Projects
services.description: That growing list of small repairs? We knock it out in one visit. Curtain rods to molding fixes.

about.heading: Meet Jason — Tampa Bay's go-to handyman
about.body: Professional, skilled, and pleasant to work with. Jason handles everything from emergency repairs to planned projects across Tampa Bay. Known for showing up on time, working clean, and getting it right the first time. When neighbors need something fixed, they call us.

reviews.name: Kristen A.
reviews.text: Jason is incredibly professional and truly skilled. Fixed my entire punch list — bi-fold closets, curtain rods, molding, and bathroom vanity. Cannot say enough great things!

reviews.name: Charlie O.
reviews.text: Drywall, paint work, and soffit repairs after squirrel damage. Jason did a great job with all the repairs we needed.

reviews.name: Marc P.
reviews.text: Showed up on time, fixed my outdoor sink remount faster than expected. Will use Handyman Tampa Bay again without question!

reviews.name: Monica O.
reviews.text: Quick to respond, right on time, reasonable price. Very pleasant to be around. Great experience!

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving Tampa Bay
service_areas.subheading: Professional handyman services throughout the region

cta.heading: Ready to cross items off your list?
cta.body: From small repairs to complete projects, we handle it all. Get your free estimate today and see why Tampa Bay trusts us with their homes.
